allow: PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { $conn | Select-Object LocalAddress, LocalPort, OwningProcess | Format-Table; Get-Process -Id $conn[0].OwningProcess | Select-Object ProcessName, Id } else { 'Nothing is listening on port 8080' })

PowerShell(Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList '-NoProfile','-ExecutionPolicy','Bypass','-File',"`"$PWD\\serve.ps1`"" -WindowStyle Minimized; Start-Sleep -Seconds 2; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:8080/' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 5; "Server is up — HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes" } catch { "Server failed to respond: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 8080 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { "Port 8080 already serving \(PID $\($conn[0].OwningProcess\)\)" } else { 'Port 8080 free' })
